title: Chugach Announces Senior Leadership Changes
summary: Peter Andersen has been appointed Chief Operating Officer (COO) for Chugach. In his role as COO, Andersen will oversee growth strategy and operations for Chugach’s operating companies and investment portfolio, as well as the corporate Business Enterprise functions that support them.
